opening.title: UX/UI Designer with 2.5 years of front-end in my DNA
opening.description: At Infotel, Arsene Innovation and La Centrale, I built React interfaces against real constraints — accessibility, performance, tight deadlines. That background taught me what good design must respect to exist in production. Now pursuing a Master's in UX Design at IIM Paris, I design experiences that hold up beyond the mockup.

journey.heading: Journey
journey.step1: 2.5 years in front-end development at Infotel, Arsene Innovation, and La Centrale. Daily work with React, accessibility, and performance constraints.
journey.step2: Professional degree in Web & Mobile at Sorbonne for solid technical foundations. Discovered my true passion: design-dev collaboration.
journey.step3: Master's in Interactive UX Design at IIM Paris to formalize this hybrid expertise. I speak developers' language and design systems that work in production.

jobSearch.title: September 2026
jobSearch.description: Looking for a 24-month work-study program • 1 week school / 3 weeks company rhythm

pitch.title:
Designer who codes.
Developer who designs.
pitch.body: 2.5 years of front-end development, a specialisation in UX/UI, and the belief that the best interfaces are born when design and code truly talk to each other.
